system.Text:
__When you make a deal where currency is the medium of exchange__, envision the scene.

If you are acquiring an asset or service, reference this table to determine its cost in wealth:

| Asset or Service | Mechanical outcome | Cost |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Object improvement | Upgrade an item asset | 2 |
| Object, fine | Acquire an uncommon item asset | 2 |
| Object, simple | Acquire a common item and take +1 momentum | 1 |
| Provisions, bountiful | Take up to +5 supply | 2 |
| Provisions, modest | Take up to +2 supply | 1 |
| Service, average | Make the appropriate move | 1 |
| Service, fine | Make the appropriate move and add +2 | 2 |


Upmarket (on a hit when you @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.PyWjKpW3jMYY5IDn]{Browse the Market})
| Asset or Service | Mechanical outcome | Cost |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Object, exceptional | Acquire a notable item asset | 3 |
| Object, precious | Acquire a rare item asset | 4 |
| Object, wondrous | Acquire an exotic item asset | 5 |
| Object, greatly abnormal | Acquire a major splinter, item asset | 4 |
| Object, slightly abnormal | Acquire a minor splinter, item asset | 3 |
| Partnership | Acquire a companion asset | 4 |
| Partnership, exceptional | Acquire a special companion asset | 5 |
| Service, costly | Make the appropriate move; you  may reroll any dice | 3 |
| Ship feature | Acquire a module asset | 4 |
| Training | Upgrade a path asset | 3 |
| Training, special | Acquire a path asset | 4 |
| Training, partner | Upgrade a companion asset | 3 |
| Training, exceptional partner | Upgrade a special companion asset | 4 |
| Vessel improvement | Upgrade a vehicle or module asset | 3 |
| Vessel, minor | Acquire a support vehicle asset | 4 |
| Vessel, major | Acquire a command vehicle asset | 5 |

If you are selling...
* A modest amount of provisions: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-2) and take +1 wealth
* Apparels, consumables, tools, or weapons: Discard it and take +1 wealth for every marked ability. If the asset is broken, take 1 wealth less (to a minimum of 1).
* A command vehicle or module: Discard it and take +2 wealth for every marked ability (to a maximum of 5). If the asset is broken, battered, or cursed, take 1 wealth less.

Trigger.Text: When you search in a community, physical or digital, to find an asset, service, or someone interested in what you offer
